description: OsReleaseFile contains the OS release information from a node

apiVersion.description: APIVersion defines the versioned schema of this representation of an object.

kind.description: Kind is a string value representing the REST resource this object represents.

spec.description: OsReleaseFileSpec contains the actual OS release file content

content.description: Content is the raw content of the OS release file

nodeName.description: NodeName is the name of the node this data came from

status.description: OsReleaseFileStatus contains status information about the sensing

error.description: Error contains any error message from the last sensing attempt

lastSensed.description: LastSensed is the timestamp when this data was last collected
